text.content:
Mutant

Source: Genetic (5 pts, first free)

Permission: Power Theme (5 pts) — All powers must fit a cohesive mutation theme.

Intrinsics: None required.

Description

Your powers come from a genetic mutation, whether inborn or triggered by some external factor. All your abilities must follow a common theme — ice powers, shapeshifting, psychic abilities, etc.

Preset Meta-Qualities

  • Genetic (Source) — 5 pts (first free = 0)
  • Power Theme (Permission) — 5 pts

Archetype Cost: 5 pts

Reference

📖 Wild Talents 2e, Chapter 5, p.97–98
